name: Choumei
description: Choumei (重明, Choumei), more commonly known as the Seven-Tails (七尾, Nanabi), is a tailed beast sealed within Fuu from Takigakure. It has been captured, extracted, and sealed by Akatsuki. In the anime, Choumei is indicated to have been one of the two tailed beasts that Akatsuki captured before the start of Part II.
